# original_score.csv

## Description
Contains the original LLM score from the first query of the SimpleCapacityV8.1.1 prompt for all transcripts that have been processed. This includes all transcripts, not just those that scored above the threshold. Scores are extracted from the earliest query (minimum query_id) for each transcript.

## Generated by
`src/post_query/analysis/top_transcript_list.py`

## Variables

### transcriptid
Unique transcript identifier from Capital IQ. Int64 type. Primary key for merging with other datasets.

### score
Original LLM score from the first query of SimpleCapacityV8.1.1 prompt. Float64 type. Score ranges from 0-100, where higher scores indicate higher likelihood of collusive communication. This is the score from the initial single query before any validation runs or repeats.
